title: AST Warrant Arrest: Tok [AK25095675]
summary: On 10/4/2025 at approximately 1700 hours, Alaska State Troopers in Tok contacted and arrested Justin West, 34, of Tok. Justin was remanded to Fairbanks Correctional Center on his Warrant for charges of Assault 2, Terroristic Threatening, Coercion and Assault 4.

title: AST Warrant Arrest, Probation Violation: Fairbanks [AK25100724]
summary: On October 3, 2025, at approximately 0647 hours, the Alaska State Troopers conducted a traffic stop on a vehicle in the area of 24th AVE. The passenger was identified as Janell Williams, 40YOA of Fairbanks. Janell had a 7500-dollar cash performance warrant in 4FA-25-00447CR. Investigation revealed that Janell was also in violation of her probation. Janell was remanded to the Fairbanks Correctional Center for her warrant and a probation violation.
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: Government shutdown primed to roll into next week after US Senate deadlocks again
summary: Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer of New York speaks to reporters at a press conference at the U.S. Capitol during the third day of a federal government shutdown, on Friday, Oct. 3, 2025. (Photo by Ashley Murray/States Newsroom) WASHINGTON — An agreement to reopen the federal government was nowhere in sight Friday after U.S. Senate Democrats and Republicans failed Friday, for the fourth time, to move on a deal and House Speaker Mike Johnson announced he won’t bring his members back until the middle of the month. Two Senate votes to advance funding bills flopped, as expected, as Senate Democrats remained almost unanimous in demanding Republicans...

title: Annual Alaska disease report shows dip in sexually transmitted infections
summary: Brochures available on Oct. 17, 2023, at the Youth and Elders Conference in Anchorage give information on safer sex and avoidance of sexually transmitted infections. Alaska has long had among the nation's highest rates for some sexually transmitted infections, but case numbers declined in 2024. (Photo by Yereth Rosen/Alaska Beacon) Cases of sexually transmitted infec...
